emails.subject: NETA papers
emails.body: Kristin and Stacey- I know that we probably won't be performing the UK Power doorsteps, but I did receive the NETA papers that Chris had sent. Do you all have an interest in getting a copy? Let me know. Thanks, Christy

emails.subject: RE: NETA papers
emails.body: RE: NETA papers You can go ahead and send it to me as I am sure I will be performing the review at some point. Thanks, Stacey

emails.subject: RE: NETA papers
emails.body: I will get you a copy where are you at these days?
